case_title: JOYCE MONROE VS. IRA GORDON et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF PLTF JOYCE MONROE IN SUPPORT OF AN ORAL LEASE AGREEMENT WITH DEFT IRA GORDON FILED BY PLAINTIFF MONROE, JOYCE
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GORDON, IRA
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MONROE, JOYCE SERVED DEC-19-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GORDON, IRA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONROE, JOYCE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GORDON, IRA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1375 SHAFTER AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94124, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF MONROE, JOYCE AS TO DEFENDANT GORDON, IRA DOES 1 TO 25
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $6.67 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MONROE, JOYCE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT GORDON, IRA
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MONROE, JOYCE AS TO DEFENDANT GORDON, IRA DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MONROE, JOYCE SERVED DEC-22-2011, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 25
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT GORDON, IRA DOES 1 TO 25
